step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for her face, hair color and styling in the low loose bun, sun-kissed Mediterranean skin, body proportions, pale buttery yellow ribbed tank and matching bike shorts, white canvas sneakers, gold cuff bracelet, gold huggie earrings, and the entire pilates studio entrance hallway scene including the warm wood floor, sage-green wall, tall mirror, wooden bench with rolled cream towel — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. She is now holding the Alluvi product in her right hand at chest level slightly forward of her body: her right arm bent at the elbow, wrist relaxed, fingers naturally curved around the box with thumb on the front face, four fingers wrapping the back edge, the box held at a relaxed angle three-quarters toward the camera so the front face catches the warm morning light. The product is approximately 7 inches wide, sized realistically relative to her hand. Her body posture, mid-stride gait, and arm angle may shift slightly to make the holding pose look natural and not stamped on. Both hands must remain visible in the frame — her right hand visibly grips the product, her left hand continues to hold the strap of the small straw tote bag at her left side. Do not hide either hand in pockets, behind her back, or crop them out of the frame. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color; the scene's warm morning light should illuminate the white surface as light, not tint the white golden. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: soft warm morning daylight from the open front door at the end of the hallway, with a warm rim light on her right side and a soft shadow falling toward her left.
